messages.noOres: You don't have the ores to smelt anything.
messages.levelTooLowSmelt: You need level {level} Smithing to smelt that.
messages.outOfMaterials: You have run out of materials.
messages.ironSmeltFail: The ore is too impure and you fail to smelt it.
messages.noHammer: You need a hammer to work the metal on this anvil.
messages.noBars: You don't have the bars to smith anything.
messages.levelTooLowSmith: You need level {level} Smithing to make that.
messages.outOfBars: You have run out of bars.
messages.smithSuccess: You hammer the {metal} and make a {item}.
